# Fuel Path Support Runbook

## Intake

Support contact: support@fuelpath.app
Privacy and support contact: privacy@fuelpath.app
Support owner: Leo Kesselring

Capture privacy and deletion requests, provider price reports, map/location failures and alert failure reports without exact home/work addresses or push tokens.

## Triage

Use P0, P1 and P2 queues with a named reply owner for every issue.

## Escalation

Escalate privacy incidents, misleading provider-price claims, stale alert failures and native map/location failures.

## Privacy And Data Requests

Record privacy and deletion requests by request date, owner, data type and completion date.

## Provider Price Issues

Record fuel price, price accuracy, price mismatch and station data issues by region, source, fuel type and timestamp.

## Native Device Issues

Record device map/location failures, notification permission states and alert-failure details by app build.

## Evidence Logging

Record privacy/deletion, provider-price, map/location and alert-failure evidence for each release review.
